events.name: Localized Gang Skirmishes
events.description: Rival factions clash in the streets, disrupting industry, spreading fear, and reducing migration as citizens avoid dangerous areas.

events.name: Miasma in the Streets
events.description: A mysterious sickness spreads through the colony, unsettling the population and disrupting daily life. Its origin is unknown, but the effects are felt by everyone.

events.name: General Strike
events.description: Picket lines spring up across the colony. Placards read: 'An injury to one is an injury to all.' With the cry 'United we bargain, divided we beg,' workers down tools, freezing production.
